programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some girls spend the day picking and sorting vegetables in their nannies garden. Tinky Winky sets the table for Tubby Toast, but when he calls the other Tubbies, Noo-Noo tidies it all up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children visit and aquarium to learn how things swim in the water. The Teletubbies play an in and out game when a cloud appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance before watching some children wrapping presents for their friend. The Noo Noo tidies up the Teletubbies blankets, while the Tubbies are still in bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa comes in through the door and up the slide to join the others and watch Christopher whose mum and dad look after poorly hedgehogs. A magical new event happens in Teletubbyland – Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa wants to play indoors. She asks Po, Dipsy and Tinky Winky to play indoors too, but they want to play outdoors.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy makes bouncy Tubby Toast. It bounces all around Home Hill. The Teletubbies watch two children make an apple pie. Bo Peep appears in Teletubbyland looking for her lost sheep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree under a cloud. Andy Brown and some children visit some giraffes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children watch some badgers. In Teletubbyland, Dipsy sat down to watch. He watched the windmill turning, the rabbits playing, and the trees in the wind.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has a new family of Pigs being delivered to his farm and Bob must build a new home for them. In the meantime, Farmer Pickles places the pigs in an old Barn to keep them safe.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It is Wendy’s birthday, but she insists she doesn’t want any fuss – such as a surprise party. She heads off to start the day’s work, laying a Heritage Trail around the town, and Bob reveals to the Machines that he is not planning a party.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a day off and he takes a trip to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs for the town photography competition. Wendy, meanwhile, has been called to the school hall where a pipe has burst, threatening the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are all ready to set up Mr Sabatini’s bakery opposite the windmill so it’s close to the flour. Bob promises a surprise when they get there, and who should roll out from behind a bush but Benny!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today Bob and the team have a very exciting job to do. They are building a bridge over the river to where Mr Sabatini’s new bakery will be. Bob promises Scrambler that he can be the first machine across the bridge.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot, so Bob and crew will have to use some smelly chemicals to fix it. As these will affect Mr Fothergill’s allergies, he goes to his sister’s for the day. But she doesn’t get on with Hamish, his pet parrot.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: After a stormy night, Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts’, while Bob repairs a drainage pipe for Farmer Pickles. A wire fence has been blown away at the farm too, but fixing the pipe takes priority.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today’s the day that the machines get to build their brand new shelter. It’s going to be built into the side of a hill and made using found materials. Lofty, who slept outside at the old yard, decides that he’d like a place in the new shelter.

programme.title: When Bob Became a Builder
programme.desc: It’s a beautiful day in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his machine team are building a new picnic area at the beach. Dizzy, Lofty and Scrambler are clearing stuff that’s been washed up on the beach, while Benny has a great time digging with Scoop and Muck.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Croxteth Hall Part 2
programme.desc: We stay with the team and find out what happened after we left them last time. The team seem to be stalked by something…but what.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Rowleys House
programme.desc: The team head to the centre of Shrewsbury and a large building that is all but empty.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: This old pup in the heart of West Yorkshire is said to be one of the Most Haunted places in England.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 1
programme.desc: An old house in England’s West Midlands gives the Most Haunted team a night they will never forget.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House
programme.desc: This week Yvette Fielding takes her Most Haunted team to Coalville and a house that is surrounded by mystery. The team seem to disturb the rest of some of its long-term residence as they battle through a night of terror.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Motorcycle, Blind Man's Dog, Deer Hunters, Tribal Curse, The Card Game.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bright Light, Magic Mightyman, The Student, Scribbles, Count Mystery.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Dead Beat Daddy, Ghost Town, The Sewing Machine, The Sleepwalker, Money Laundry.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Witness to Murder, Roulette Wheel, The Phrenologist's Head, The Bridge, The Cigar Box.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Blood Donor, Epitaph, Stiches in Time, Soldier.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Out of Service, When I Was Big, The Greedy Investor, Seven Hours of Bad Luck, The Secret of the Coins.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes of the Past
programme.desc: The Johnson’s young daughter reveals that two fairies visit her room each night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Blood Visions
programme.desc: Faced with a supernatural threat, Betty Johnson and her family move hoping to leave their troubles behind. But when Betty’s oldest child starts experiencing bloody visions and is physically attacked, the family realizes "it" has followed them.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare Upstairs
programme.desc: The VanLandingham family moves to a larger house in the small town of Wynne, Arkansas. What they first consider "house-settling" noise and behavior quickly turns into a full-scale supernatural physical attack on both daughters Brianna and Heather.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble is thrilled to show Tutu her new ballerina room, but when another guest's music starts to blare through the walls, it's up to Bubble to put a stop to this rock n' roll sized problem.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble gives Delphina some seahorse-riding lessons to help her fulfil her lifelong dream.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble and Nabi try to clean Tressa's dirty pup before Tressa gets back and sees him filthy. But things get out of hand when her bubble solution makes the pooch sprout oodles of hair.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble uses her bubble magic to make Candy's cake bigger, but the cake won't stop inflating!

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble and Nabi try to stay up all night to make their bat guest Pip happy. But as time ticks by, they find themselves getting super tired.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When Bubble's guest Florina doesn't want to leave the hotel, Bubble suggests she take a souvenir to remember the hotel by. Things get out of hand when Florina tries to take everything she lays her hands on.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Nabi risks losing his perfect record of guest satisfaction when he can't understand the request of their new hyperactive guest.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When Bubble encourages Nabi to get a hairdo from their stylish guest Hairiet, Nabi struggles to tell Bubble that he likes his hair just the way it is.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble super-sizes the hotel pumpkins to make her guest happy, but her magic might have gone too far when a pumpkin breaks free and starts destroying the room.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble tries to climb up a mountain with her guest Hilary as fast as possible. They wind up on the wrong path with a yeti in pursuit, but with Nabi's help, they learn to slow down and make a plan.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad searches a tropical island for fabled water monster Gil. But before travelling back to Monster High, an island volcano begins to erupt.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: In an effort to save Gil's island, the ghouls travel to an icy mountain range to find a ghoul with ice powers to stop the imminent volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad discover Gob running wild in a department store for humans. Now the ghouls have to work together to get him back to Monster High before the store reopens.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Toralei complicates the Ghoul Squad's latest mission to find a hidden monster deep inside ancient catacombs when she tries to take an artefact that triggers the ancient cave's traps.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad travels to Paris to recruit a gargoyle. But Rochelle can't leave until the ghouls help her deal with a troublesome, roof-destroying gargoyle named Rockspierre.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: A hiccup with the Monster Mapalogue causes fuzzy little monsters from a popular new game to come to life in Monster High; the ghouls must upgrade their iCoffins to suck the monsters back into the video game before they destroy the school.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The ghouls make it their mission to help Catty get over her stage fright by performing in the upcoming Monster High talent show.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: In an effort to go on a beach vacation, Toralei steals the Monster Mapalogue, but breaks it, accidentally teleporting herself, Cleo and Lagoona to a faraway desert location.
